calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THIS CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS MORNING FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL; THE APPELLANT DIANA THAI APPEARS; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR RESPONDENT MS. JENNIFER SPRINGHETTI THIS DAY. THE COURT THEN HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY APPELLANT DIANA THAI, AND THE MATTER IS THEN TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT STUMPF; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Continued To May-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
